message:
fix: work around VDBE sqlite_master parameterized query limitation

Replace parameterized queries against sqlite_master with format!-based
string interpolation in test helper functions across three crates.
FrankenSQLite's VDBE cannot currently open a storage cursor on
sqlite_master's root page when bound parameters are used, causing
test failures during schema introspection.

Affected helpers (all test-only, trusted constant inputs):
- frankensearch-fsfs/catalog.rs: table_exists(), index_exists()
- frankensearch-ops/storage.rs: table_exists(), index_exists()
- frankensearch-storage/schema.rs: index_exists(), expected_tables loop

Each replacement includes a safety comment documenting the VDBE
limitation and noting that only trusted test constants are interpolated.

Also applies minor clippy formatting fix in daemon_fallback.rs
(expand inline allow attribute list to multi-line).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -378,24 +378,28 @@ mod tests {
     use fsqlite_types::value::SqliteValue;
 
     fn table_exists(conn: &Connection, table_name: &str) -> bool {
-        let params = [SqliteValue::Text(table_name.to_owned())];
+        // Use non-parameterized query: FrankenSQLite's VDBE cannot open a
+        // storage cursor on sqlite_master's root page with bound parameters.
+        // Safe here because callers pass trusted test constants only.
+        let sql = format!(
+            "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table' AND name = '{table_name}' LIMIT 1;"
+        );
         let rows = conn
-            .query_with_params(
-                "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table' AND name = ?1 LIMIT 1;",
-                &params,
-            )
+            .query(&sql)
             .map_err(catalog_error)
             .expect("sqlite_master table query should succeed");
         !rows.is_empty()
     }
 
     fn index_exists(conn: &Connection, index_name: &str) -> bool {
-        let params = [SqliteValue::Text(index_name.to_owned())];
+        // Use non-parameterized query: FrankenSQLite's VDBE cannot open a
+        // storage cursor on sqlite_master's root page with bound parameters.
+        // Safe here because callers pass trusted test constants only.
+        let sql = format!(
+            "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'index' AND name = '{index_name}' LIMIT 1;"
+        );
         let rows = conn
-            .query_with_params(
-                "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'index' AND name = ?1 LIMIT 1;",
-                &params,
-            )
+            .query(&sql)
             .map_err(catalog_error)
             .expect("sqlite_master index query should succeed");
         !rows.is_empty()
